summary: Use when the agent must touch, collect, visit, or contact multiple objects such as rocks, coins, checkpoints, or floating targets.
state_tracking_rule: Store target names only. Do not store ObjectRecord, Body, Shape, or raw position objects in registry state.
add_objects_pattern: For each target, call create_dynamic_circle or create_static_box with a stable name like 'rock_1'.
Append each target name to self.objective_targets immediately after creation.
Scatter targets in two dimensions rather than placing all targets in one collinear chain that blocks later contacts.
objective_pattern: Do not clear self.targets_touched inside check_objective; it is persistent collection memory.
For each target_name in self.objective_targets, call self.distance_between('agent', target_name).
A target is touched when distance <= self.agent_radius + self.target_radius + self.touch_threshold.
When touched, add target_name to self.targets_touched and leave it there.
ground_truth_pattern: Expose objective_type, objective_targets, targets_touched, targets_remaining, and objective_satisfied in truth['objective'].
common_failures: Storing ObjectRecord or Body values in self.objective_targets.
Forgetting to append target names to self.objective_targets.
Returning True after touching only one target instead of all targets.
Placing targets in a single tight line so the first target physically blocks direct contact with later targets.
